scenarios.capability: Categorize a requirement list into Must/Should/Could/Won't tiers with rationale
scenarios.reason: The agent can apply the categorization rules to a provided requirement list and produce a priority table without runtime tools.

scenarios.capability: Enforce the 60% Must effort cap and propose rebalancing options
scenarios.reason: The agent can calculate effort percentages and propose rebalancing when Must exceeds the threshold.

scenarios.capability: Identify anti-patterns in a provided priority table and correct them
scenarios.reason: The agent can review a provided table against the skill's anti-patterns and produce corrected entries.

scenarios.capability: Produce a complete MoSCoW decision log with owners and review dates
scenarios.reason: The agent can generate a structured decision log document following the skill's output format.

scenarios.capability: Resolve a stakeholder conflict by applying the failure-focused Must test
scenarios.reason: The agent can apply the failure-focused question to a described conflict and produce a written resolution recommendation.
